tools.name: createChannel
tools.description: Create a new messaging channel with a name, description, and privacy setting.

tools.name: listChannels
tools.description: listChannels tool for SpokeChat

tools.name: getChannel
tools.description: Get channel details including members and pinned message count.

tools.name: updateChannel
tools.description: Update a channel

tools.name: deleteChannel
tools.description: Archive and soft-delete a channel.

tools.name: joinChannel
tools.description: Join a channel.

tools.name: leaveChannel
tools.description: Leave a channel.

tools.name: sendMessage
tools.description: Send a message to a channel, optionally as a reply in a thread.

tools.name: listMessages
tools.description: List messages in a channel with pagination.

tools.name: editMessage
tools.description: Edit an existing message

tools.name: deleteMessage
tools.description: Delete a message.

tools.name: getThread
tools.description: Get a message thread with all replies.

tools.name: searchMessages
tools.description: Search messages across all channels by text, author, or date range.

tools.name: addReaction
tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message.

tools.name: removeReaction
tools.description: Remove an emoji reaction from a message.

tools.name: getReactions
tools.description: Get all reactions on a message with user lists.

tools.name: setPresence
tools.description: Set the current user

tools.name: getUserPresence
tools.description: Get a specific user

tools.name: getOnlineUsers
tools.description: Get a list of all currently online users with their presence status.

tools.name: pinMessage
tools.description: Pin a message to a channel.

tools.name: unpinMessage
tools.description: Unpin a message from a channel.

tools.name: getPinnedMessages
tools.description: Get all pinned messages in a channel.

tools.name: createDM
tools.description: Create or open a direct message conversation with another user.

tools.name: listDMs
tools.description: List all direct message conversations with unread counts.
